question: Explain what JavaScript File Uploader is and why it matters in JavaScript.
answer: JavaScript File Uploader is Build a file upload component: drag-drop, progress bars, file validation, preview, and chunked uploads. It matters because it helps developers write cleaner, more maintainable code and is fundamental to modern JavaScript development.
